text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Wait... What was that just now?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What is this heat? It feels like something
incredible is welling up from deep within me. I
can't put it into words...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But this sensation is nicht schlecht. No, it's not
bad at all. In fact, it's rather pleasant.
